headline: Record AI-Fueled Data Center Leasing Could Be A Game Changer For Iron Mountain (IRM)
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Iron Mountain reported strong first-quarter results, raising its full-year guidance as data center revenue grew rapidly and leasing activity accelerated, alongside routine governance updates at its annual meeting and a pre-planned stock sale by director Pamela Arway under a Rule 10b5-1 plan. The standout development was record data center leasing, with management indicating it expects to surpass its annual leasing target, underscoring how AI-related infrastructure demand...

The standout development was record data center leasing, with management indicating it expects to surpass its annual leasing target, underscoring how AI-related infrastructure demand...

headline: A Look At Iron Mountain (IRM) Valuation After Strong Q1 Growth And Raised AI Driven Data Center Guidance
summary: How Iron Mountain’s Q1 earnings and guidance reset the story for IRM stock Iron Mountain (IRM) is back in focus after its first quarter 2026 report, which showed revenue up 21.58% year over year and sharp growth in its Data Center business driven by leasing. Management also raised full year guidance and highlighted ongoing demand linked to AI infrastructure projects. This combination has helped support recent strength in the stock despite a pre planned insider sale. See our latest analysis...
